source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A piston/cylinder arrangement B is connected to a 1-m^3 tank A by a line and valve. Initially both contain water, with A at 100 kPa, saturated vapor and B at 400\circ\text{C}, 300 kPa, 1 m3. The valve is now opened, and the water in both A and B comes to a uniform state. If the process results in T_2 = 200 \circ\text{C}, find the heat transfer of the process.

If the process results in T_2 = 200 \circ\text{C}, find the heat transfer of the process.
